name: Sell Us Gold
description_short: Austin Rare Coins & Bullion buys and sells precious metals, rare coins, and ancient numismatic collectibles with real-time spot price tracking.
description_long:
Austin Rare Coins & Bullion operates as a precious metals and rare coin dealer based in Austin, Texas. The company specializes in buying and selling physical gold, silver, platinum, and palladium in various forms, from bullion bars to numismatic coins. They maintain an extensive inventory of U.S. rare coins, world coins, ancient coins dating back centuries, and contemporary bullion products like American Gold Eagles and Canadian Maple Leafs.

The company's primary service is the sale of precious metals and collectible coins to investors and collectors. Their website displays live spot prices for gold, silver, platinum, and palladium, allowing customers to track market rates in real-time. They offer a broad product range including gold coins and bars, silver coins and bars, rare U.S. coins (both gold and silver), world coins, ancient coins spanning from 359 BC to modern era, and platinum/palladium products. Pricing ranges from under $80 for 1-oz silver rounds to over $20,000 for rare historical pieces like the 46 BC Julius Caesar Gold Aureus.

Austin Rare Coins distinguishes itself through its focus on numismatic collectibility alongside bullion investment value. Their inventory includes professionally graded coins (NGC and PCGS certification), specialized categories like Crusader coins and Ptolemaic Kingdom pieces, and rare U.S. currency with documented provenance such as shipwreck coins. They provide both common bullion products for mass-market investors and ultra-rare ancient coins for serious collectors. The company is accessible via phone (833-201-7166, M-F 9-5 CST) and offers website accessibility features through AudioEye toolbar integration.

As a precious metals dealer, Austin Rare Coins serves the investment and collector market but does not appear to offer the traditional pawn-shop service of accepting collateral-based loans or purchasing used goods. Their model is transactional sales-focused rather than lending-focused. Inventory availability fluctuates—several items show as unavailable with call-for-availability status. The company's Easter closure announcement suggests standard retail operations. Prices are tied to volatile commodity markets, and buying/selling spreads are not transparently disclosed on the website.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Live real-time spot prices displayed for gold, silver, platinum, and palladium
Extensive inventory of rare and ancient coins with NGC/PCGS professional grading certifications
Wide product range from affordable 1-oz bullion ($75-$82) to ultra-rare collectibles ($20K+)
Specialization in numismatic value allows collectors to invest in both metal content and scarcity premium
Direct phone line with posted business hours (833-201-7166, M-F 9-5 CST) for price verification
Diverse coin categories including U.S., world, ancient, and Crusader coins with documented provenance
cons: Buy/sell spreads and markup percentages are not transparently disclosed on the website
Multiple products show unavailable status requiring phone contact for pricing and availability
No information on shipping costs, insurance, or delivery timelines for online orders
Website does not clearly state whether they purchase/accept gold and coins from customers (only sell)
Prices subject to volatile commodity market fluctuations with no price-lock guarantees mentioned
best_for: Precious metals investors seeking to buy bullion coins and bars with live price tracking
Coin collectors interested in rare, graded, and ancient numismatic pieces
Individuals diversifying portfolios with tangible gold, silver, platinum assets
Collectors of historical currency with authentication and professional grading documentation
diagnosis: Austin Rare Coins is best for investors and collectors seeking to purchase precious metals bullion and rare numismatic coins with authenticated grading. The primary caveat is that the company functions as a seller/retailer rather than a traditional pawn shop offering collateral loans, and buy-back pricing, spreads, and acquisition information are not transparently disclosed online.
services: Purchase and sale of 1-oz gold coins (American Eagles, Canadian Maple Leafs, Krugerrands)
Gold bullion bars in various weights and brands
Silver coins and bars including American Silver Eagles and Buffalo rounds
Rare U.S. gold coins with NGC/PCGS certification and grading
Rare U.S. silver coins and Morgan Dollar collections
Ancient coins spanning 359 BC through modern era with professional authentication
World coins from various countries and historical periods
Bulk purchase options (mint rolls and mint boxes of silver eagles)
Real-time spot price tracking and market information display
Phone-based customer service for availability checks and inquiries
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 4360 S Congress Ave STE 101, Austin, TX 78745
